name: deploy-prod
purpose: Deployment workflow for Firebase Hosting and Cloud Functions — step-by-step git-pull, npm build, firebase deploy sequence with '// turbo' step annotations.
notes: Created 2025-12-15 (Session ~#47). Modified Jan 2026 to expand from 4 steps to 7 steps with '// turbo' execution-hint annotations. '.agent/workflows/' was a pre-.claude/skills/ experimentation format — likely influenced by skills.sh 'workflows' convention or an early Claude Code command format. No active references from CLAUDE.md or .claude/ hooks. Superseded by .claude/commands/ (now also deprecated) and then .claude/skills/. Not referenced by any hook or skill. Classification: legacy workflow doc from Dec 2025 era. '// turbo' is an inline step annotation meaning the step can run concurrently/immediately without waiting — not a dependency on the Turborepo build system.

name: find-skills
purpose: Earlier snapshot of find-skills skill — helps users discover and install agent skills via skills.sh ecosystem and Claude Code plugin marketplaces.
notes: Added 2026-02-08 in same commit as .claude/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md. Diff shows .agents/ version is a truncated predecessor: missing 'When to Use', 'When NOT to Use', and 'Version History' sections that appear in the .claude/ canonical version. '.agents/skills/' appears to be a transitional staging path that predates .claude/skills/ as the canonical location — possibly from when Claude Code's agent config was stored at '.agents/' instead of '.claude/'. The .claude/skills/find-skills/SKILL.md is the live canonical copy. This file is orphaned — no references from CLAUDE.md, session-start.js, or any hook. superseded_by: 'find-skills (.claude/skills/)'

name: gitconfig-delta
purpose: Reference git config snippet for delta diff pager — sets core.pager, interactive.diffFilter, and delta display options (navigate, side-by-side, line-numbers, Dracula theme).
notes: Added 2026-03-28 (Sessions #242-243) as part of CLI tools ecosystem setup. The file is a reference config snippet — setup-cli-tools.sh does NOT copy this file; instead it calls 'git config --global' commands to set equivalent values. The .gitconfig-delta file serves as documentation/reference for what was configured. Fully portable — no SoNash-specific values. Deployment: user-scoped (~/.gitconfig global). runtime_scope: user.

name: ntfy.conf
purpose: ntfy.sh notification config specifying the project-specific topic name 'sonash-claude' for mobile push notifications from Claude Code Notification hooks.
sanitize_fields: topic=sonash-claude — topic name is project-specific, must be renamed per project
notes: Added 2026-03-28 (Sessions #242-243). Topic 'sonash-claude' is SoNash-specific — it pairs with the ntfy.sh Notification event hook in .claude/hooks/. Subscriber uses the ntfy mobile app on that topic to receive real-time notifications. To port: rename topic to match the new project slug. Not deployed by setup-cli-tools.sh (no ntfy deploy step found) — likely manually placed or used directly from repo path. runtime_scope: machine (ntfy app subscribes to topic on device).

name: starship.toml
purpose: Starship shell prompt configuration — minimal format showing directory, git branch/status, Node.js version, command duration; deployed to ~/.config/starship.toml via setup-cli-tools.sh.
notes: Added 2026-03-28 (Sessions #242-243). Fully portable — no SoNash-specific values. Deployed by scripts/setup-cli-tools.sh: copies to ~/.config/starship.toml when file is newer than installed copy. Disables package version widget. Sets 2s min_time threshold for command duration display. runtime_scope: machine (installed to ~/.config/).

name: zoxide-init.sh
purpose: Shell snippet for zoxide init — single eval line for adding to ~/.bashrc; reference doc for setup-cli-tools.sh which manages actual deployment.
notes: Added 2026-03-28 (Sessions #242-243). Contains one-line 'eval "$(zoxide init bash)"'. setup-cli-tools.sh handles actual deployment by appending to ~/.bashrc if not present — this file is reference documentation. Fully portable. runtime_scope: machine (modifies ~/.bashrc).
